about.description: A desktop client for SSH-centric operations and mixed terminal workflows.

activeSessions.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, type, or session ID...

ai.agentMaxStepsDesc: Maximum steps in the ReAct loop for Agent mode.
ai.agentNoTerminal: Agent mode requires an active terminal session
ai.clearHistoryDesc: This deletes all AI conversation history and cancels active AI requests. This action cannot be undone.
ai.empty: Ask AI to explain terminal output or generate commands for you.
ai.enableOneModelHint: Enable at least one model before using the AI panel.
ai.executeUnsupported: The current terminal does not support automatic execution
ai.fileUnsupported: This file is not supported for AI analysis
ai.goToSettingsToEnable: Please go to Settings to enable
ai.maxAiFileSize: Max file size for file AI actions
ai.maxAiFileSizeDesc: Hide file AI actions when the selected file exceeds this size.
ai.modelListDesc: Refresh pulls known models from rust-genai. New models are disabled by default.
ai.noCredentials: Add an API key credential first
ai.noEnabledModels: No enabled models. Enable one under AI > Models first.
ai.noModels: No models yet. Please enable a provider or refresh the model list.
ai.placeholder: Ask anything... Type @ to mention sessions
ai.quickPrompt: Example: find the processes using the most CPU
ai.repairSelected: AI generate a fix command from selection
ai.saveDisabled: Saving AI commands is disabled in settings
ai.setupStep1: Add an API key credential (OpenAI / Anthropic / DeepSeek, etc.)
ai.setupStep2: Enable at least one available model
ai.terminalOutputLinesDesc: Number of output lines shown in the terminal when AI agent executes a command. Set to 0 to disable inline display.
ai.title: AI

common.deletingConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'?

credentialManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete credential '{{name}}'?
credentialManager.passwordUnchanged: Leave empty to keep current password
credentialManager.title: Credentials

dialog.confirmCloseDesc: There are active sessions. Are you sure you want to quit? All sessions will be disconnected.
dialog.connectionNotFound: Connection not found. It may have been deleted.
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Web server for project X
dialog.passwordRequired: Enter a password or select a saved password
dialog.proxyJumpAlreadyConfigured: This connection already uses a jump host and cannot be selected

fileExplorer.connectToSession: Connect to a session to browse files
fileExplorer.cwdTrackingUnavailable: Terminal path sync unavailable for this session
fileExplorer.externalDropOverlay: Drop files or folders to upload
fileExplorer.externalDropPathsRequired: This drag source did not expose local file paths. Use Upload Files or Upload Folder instead.
fileExplorer.externalDropTimeout: Windows did not provide local file paths for this drag source. Use Upload Files or Upload Folder instead.
fileExplorer.name: Name
fileExplorer.sureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'?
fileExplorer.sureDeleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected items?
fileExplorer.unsupportedSession: File Explorer is only available for SSH sessions
fileExplorer.unsupportedSessionDesc: Switch to an SSH tab to browse remote files.
fileExplorer.uploadPrompt: The remote file has been modified. Would you like to upload the changes?

lockScreen.message: This application has been locked due to inactivity.
lockScreen.title: Application Locked

network.bindAddressHint: Choose whether the listening port is reachable only on this device or from other hosts too.
network.bindAllInterfacesHint: Listen on 0.0.0.0 so LAN or other hosts can reach it.
network.bindConnectionFirst: Create a connection before adding a new item.
network.bindLocalhostOnlyHint: Listen on 127.0.0.1 only. Recommended for safety.
network.listenPortDynamicHint: This port exposes a SOCKS5 proxy on your current device.
network.listenPortLocalHint: This port listens on your current device and forwards traffic to a remote target service.
network.listenPortRemoteHint: This port listens on the remote SSH host and forwards traffic back to a local service.
network.noConnectionsHint: Create a connection first, then configure tunnels for it.
network.proxyDialogDescription: Configure a reusable proxy that can be assigned to any saved connection.
network.proxyEmptyHint: Create a proxy configuration, then assign it to connections in their advanced settings.
network.proxyPortRequired: Please enter a valid proxy port.
network.proxySectionDescription: Standalone proxy configurations, assignable to connections via Advanced Configuration.
network.searchConnections: Search by name, group, or host...
network.searchProxies: Search by proxy name, protocol, or host...
network.targetHostLocalHint: The remote service address to reach through the SSH tunnel.
network.targetHostRemoteHint: The local service address that remote traffic should be forwarded to.
network.targetPortLocalHint: The port used by the remote target service.
network.targetPortRemoteHint: The port used by the local service on your current device.
network.tunnelConnectionHint: Automatically opens this tunnel when the connection is established.
network.tunnelDialogDescription: Create an SSH tunnel to forward traffic through a saved connection.
network.tunnelEmptyHint: Create local, remote, or dynamic forwarding for a specific connection.
network.tunnelListenPortRequired: Please enter a valid listen port.
network.tunnelNameHint: Shown in the tunnel list, so name it by purpose.
network.tunnelNamePlaceholder: e.g. Local port for web server
network.tunnelSectionDescription: Manage local, remote, or dynamic port forwarding for a specific connection.
network.tunnelTargetRequired: Please enter a target host and port.

otp.hotpHint: Generate on demand. The counter advances each time.
otp.title: Two-Factor Authentication

otpManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
otpManager.qrImportFailed: Failed to import from QR code
otpManager.title: OTP Entries

panel.resourceMonitorDisabled: Enable "Show Remote Resource Stats" in Settings to use this feature
panel.resourceMonitorNoSession: Connect to an SSH session to view resource usage

passwordManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete password '{{name}}'?
passwordManager.passwordUnchanged: Leave empty to keep current password
passwordManager.title: Password Manager

quickCommands.appendHint: Command will be placed at the prompt for review before executing.
quickCommands.executeHint: Command will be executed automatically when clicked.
quickCommands.importMergeHint: Import merges by ID and keeps existing quick commands.
quickCommands.importSelectSource: Choose the quick command file format to import.
quickCommands.label: Label

savedConnections.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all connections and folders? This action cannot be undone.
savedConnections.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone.
savedConnections.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete folder '{{name}}' and all its contents?
savedConnections.importSelectSource: Select the configuration source to import from

secretUnlock.lockedActionHint: Unlock via the bottom bar first
secretUnlock.lockedDesc: Verify master password to view, edit, and delete entries.
secretUnlock.unlockedDesc: Plaintext is visible only while this panel stays open.
secretUnlock.wrongPassword: Wrong master password. Please try again.

serialSend.hexError: Invalid hex input. Use hex characters (0-9, A-F) separated by spaces.
serialSend.serialUnavailable: Serial data send is only available for the active serial session
serialSend.serialUnavailableDesc: Switch to a serial tab to send text or hex data here.
serialSend.shellPlaceholder: Enter a command to send to all active windows and execute...
serialSend.shellSendFailed: Failed to send command to active windows
serialSend.shellSendPartial: Some active windows did not receive the command
serialSend.shellUnavailableDesc: None of the active windows currently contain SSH, local terminal, or Telnet sessions.
serialSend.title: Command Send

settings.actionLinksDesc: Recognize patterns (IP, archive, host:port, path) in terminal output. Ctrl/Cmd+Click to run the default command. Alt+Click to show all actions.
settings.askSaveLocation: Ask for save location before downloading
settings.askSaveLocationDesc: Show a dialog to select the save location before each download.
settings.autoCheckOnStartupDesc: Compare the local snapshot with the latest cloud snapshot when the app starts.
settings.autoPushOnChangeDesc: Upload a new encrypted sync snapshot after local configuration changes settle.
settings.autoSyncStrategyDesc: Control startup checks and debounced auto-push after local data changes are saved.
settings.backgroundContentOpacityDesc: Lower values reveal more of the image. {{value}} is a balanced default.
settings.backgroundImageDesc: Use a local image behind the main window while keeping settings and child windows solid.
settings.backgroundImageFitDesc: Controls how the selected image fills the main window.
settings.backgroundImageOpacityDesc: Controls how strongly the image shows through the theme.
settings.backupIntervalHoursDesc: Create one cloud backup after this many hours have passed since the previous backup.
settings.backupRetentionCountDesc: Keep only the newest N remote backups and delete older snapshots automatically.
settings.backupStrategyDesc: Create periodic encrypted backup snapshots that also include command history.
settings.commandSuggestionsDesc: Show autocomplete suggestions from command history and built-in commands while typing.
settings.commandSuggestionsMaxCharsDesc: Only include history entries whose command length does not exceed this limit. Quick commands are unaffected.
settings.commandSuggestionsMinCharsDesc: Only include history entries whose command length is at least this limit. Quick commands are unaffected.
settings.confirmOnCloseDesc: Show a confirmation dialog when closing the application with active sessions.
settings.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy text to clipboard when selected in the terminal.
settings.dataManagementDesc: Import or export all application configuration data. Exported files are encrypted with the master password.
settings.defaultEditorDesc: The program to use for local opening of remote files. Leave empty to use the system default application.
settings.defaultEncodingDesc: The character encoding used for the terminal PTY streams.
settings.defaultFilePermissionsDesc: Octal permission mode for uploaded files (e.g. 644).
settings.defaultShellDesc: The command line shell to use when creating a new local terminal session.
settings.deleteKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete key '{{name}}'?
settings.deviceNameDesc: Used in snapshot metadata so you can identify which device uploaded it.
settings.diagnosticsDesc: Manage local structured diagnostic logs for troubleshooting and support.
settings.downloadPathDesc: The default local directory for downloading files. Leave empty to use the system download folder.
settings.downloadThreadsDesc: Number of parallel threads for file downloads (1-10).
settings.duplicateStrategyDesc: Action to take when a file with the same name already exists on the target.
settings.enableCloudSyncDesc: Allow this device to use cloud sync, manual actions, and scheduled encrypted backups.
settings.enableScreenLockDesc: When enabled, the application will lock automatically on startup or after a period of inactivity.
settings.engineUrlHint: Must include %s to represent the search term.
settings.engineUrlInvalid: This template is missing %s, so the query cannot be injected.
settings.exportConfigDesc: Compress and encrypt all config files into a .dgfy file.
settings.exportDiagnosticsDesc: Export recent logs, a runtime summary, and a manifest for troubleshooting.
settings.fontFamilyDesc: The font family used in the terminal and app UI. Topmost font has highest priority.
settings.fontLigaturesDesc: Combine multiple characters into a single typographical glyph.
settings.globalShortcutsDesc: Global hotkeys available throughout the application.
settings.hardwareAccelerationDesc: Use GPU for terminal rendering (WebGL/Canvas). Requires restart.
settings.hostKeyPolicyDesc: How to handle unknown SSH host keys during connection.
settings.hostKeyVerifyChanged: The host key for this server has changed since the last connection.
settings.hostKeyVerifyNew: You are connecting to a new host. Please verify the host key fingerprint below.
settings.hostKeyVerifyWarning: WARNING: The host key has changed! This could indicate a man-in-the-middle attack, or the server may have been reinstalled. Only accept if you trust this change.
settings.idleLockMinutesDesc: Automatically lock the application after X minutes of inactivity. 0 to disable.
settings.importConfigDesc: Restore all configuration from a .dgfy backup file. Requires app restart.
settings.importSuccess: Configuration imported successfully. Please restart the app.
settings.keepAliveIntervalDesc: Send SSH keep-alive packets every X seconds. 0 to disable.
settings.keybindingsIndexedHint: Press the shortcut key and the number 1 key.
settings.keybindingsIndexedInvalid: The setting failed and has been reset to the default.
settings.keywordHighlightBuiltinNote: Can be toggled individually and adapt to the current theme. Your custom rules override these.
settings.keywordHighlightNoRules: No custom rules yet. Click + to add one.
settings.keywordHighlightWrappedLinesDesc: Treat consecutive soft-wrapped buffer lines as one logical line so matches can continue across wraps. Enabling this adds extra scanning and cell-mapping work, so performance may drop on large terminals.
settings.keywordHighlightingDesc: Overlay colors on matching text. Enabled built-in rules apply; your rules take priority.
settings.keywordHighlightingExperimentalDesc: Overlay colors on matching text. Enabled built-in rules apply; your rules take priority. This is an unfinished experimental feature, please enable with caution.
settings.languageDesc: Select the display language for the application interface.
settings.logLevelDesc: Control how much detail is written to local diagnostic logs.
settings.logRetentionDesc: Older logs beyond this window are removed automatically.
settings.masterPasswordDesc: Set a master password to encrypt sensitive data and protect the lock screen.
settings.masterPasswordRequiredDesc: Please set a master password in Security settings before performing this operation.
settings.maxTransferRetriesDesc: Number of retry attempts when a transfer fails (0-10).
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep the application running in the background when the window is closed.
settings.noSyncHistory: No sync or backup activity has been recorded yet.
settings.noSyncHistoryMatchFilters: No sync or backup records match the current filters.
settings.openLogsDesc: Open the local log folder in your system file manager.
settings.preserveTimestampsDesc: Keep original modification timestamps when transferring files.
settings.providerRootDesc: Optional provider-specific root path before NyaTerm's namespace prefix is applied.
settings.recordingPathDesc: The directory to save terminal recording files. Leave empty to use the system download folder.
settings.remoteBackupsDesc: Inspect the remote backup catalog and resolve sync conflicts manually when both sides changed.
settings.remoteNamespaceDesc: Top-level path prefix for NyaTerm snapshots inside the selected provider.
settings.remoteStatsIntervalDesc: How often to fetch resource usage from the remote host. Default: 3 seconds.
settings.restoreRemoteBackupConfirm: Restore remote backup {{revision}} to this device? This will overwrite portable local data.
settings.resumeBrokenTransferDesc: Attempt to resume incomplete file transfers instead of restarting.
settings.rightClickPasteDesc: Paste text from clipboard when right-clicking in the terminal.
settings.s3CredentialsIncomplete: Access Key ID and Secret Access Key must both be set together.
settings.s3VirtualHostStyleDesc: Enable virtual-hosted-style requests when required by your S3-compatible provider.
settings.scheduledBackupEnabledDesc: Allow NyaTerm to create background cloud backups on the configured interval.
settings.scrollbackLinesDesc: Number of lines kept in memory for scrolling up.
settings.showLineNumbersDesc: Display line numbers in the terminal gutter.
settings.showRemoteStatsDesc: Display resource usage of the active SSH host in the Resource Monitor panel.
settings.showTimestampsDesc: Display the time each line was output in the terminal gutter.
settings.startupRestore: Restore previous session tabs on startup
settings.startupRestoreDesc: Automatically reopen the terminal sessions that were active when the application was last closed.
settings.syncDebounceSecondsDesc: Wait this long after the latest local change before uploading a sync snapshot.
settings.syncEnableFirst: Enable cloud sync before running this operation.
settings.syncMasterPasswordMissingDesc: Set a master password first. Cloud sync and backup stay disabled until one is configured.
settings.syncMasterPasswordReadyDesc: Cloud sync and backup use your master password to encrypt every snapshot.
settings.syncProviderConfigDesc: Configure the remote storage provider and namespace used by cloud sync and backups.
settings.syncProviderDesc: Choose which remote storage backend OpenDAL should use.
settings.targetLanguageDesc: The language to translate selected text into.
settings.terminalFontFamilyDesc: The monospace font family used in terminal sessions. Topmost font has highest priority.
settings.terminalShortcutsDesc: Shortcuts available within the terminal emulator.
settings.terminalThemeDesc: Select the color theme for the terminal. Choose "Follow UI Theme" to use the same theme as the application.
settings.themeDesc: Select the color theme for the application interface.
settings.title: Settings
settings.transferBufferSizeDesc: Read/write buffer size in kilobytes for file transfers.
settings.translationProvidersDesc: Configure API credentials for translation services. Google and Microsoft require no configuration.
settings.uiFontFamilyDesc: The font family used by the application interface. Topmost font has highest priority.
settings.uploadThreadsDesc: Number of parallel threads for file uploads (1-10).
settings.useOsKeyringDesc: Securely store credentials in the system's native keychain (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Secret Service).
settings.wordSeparatorsDesc: Characters that break words when double-clicking to select text.

syncGroup.description: Control terminal input broadcast scopes by group and choose the live sessions to sync.
syncGroup.noGroupSelected: Select or create a group to manage session members.
syncGroup.noGroups: No sync groups yet. Create one to synchronize input across sessions.
syncGroup.noSessionMatches: No sessions match the current filters.
syncGroup.searchPlaceholder: Search name, type, host, or session ID...
syncGroup.selectSameHostTooltip: Select all sessions on the same host as the currently selected sessions.
syncGroup.title: Sync Input Groups

tabCtx.closeRight: Close All Sessions to the Right
tabCtx.splitPersistFailed: Split layout could not be saved

terminal.largeOutputProtectionActiveDetail: Rendering is prioritizing responsiveness. Skipped {{skipped}} queued characters.
terminal.largeOutputProtectionRecoveredDetail: The terminal is responsive again. Skipped {{skipped}} queued characters during overload.

updater.portableManualDesc: Portable edition does not support automatic updates. Download the latest portable zip, close NyaTerm, replace the program files, and keep your data folder.

zmodem.selectFiles: Select files to upload via ZMODEM
zmodem.selectSaveDir: Select folder to save ZMODEM downloads
